qa_pairs.question: Why might new security groups be required when migrating virtual machine instances to the new Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: New security groups (OpenStack's firewall rules) may be required because the floating IP address range in the New Arbutus Cloud is different than the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.

qa_pairs.question: Who is responsible for backing up critical data before migrating instances on the Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Project owners are responsible for creating backups of any critical data necessary for their migration. The Arbutus Cloud Team does not make backups or copies of instances, despite the Arbutus Cloud having redundant storage systems.
